introSection: Dragon Rush is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. The ride was previously themed around the DreamWorks Kung Fu Panda film series.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The attraction opened on 14 May 2016 as part of a new area called Kung Fu Academy as Kung Fu Panda Master.

In 2025, the Kung Fu Panda theme was removed and the name was changed to Dragon Rush, with the retheming of the area to Dragon Empire.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is painted entirely red.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
Dragon Rush is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. The ride was previously themed around the DreamWorks Kung Fu Panda film series.

The attraction opened on 14 May 2016 as part of a new area called Kung Fu Academy as Kung Fu Panda Master.

In 2025, the Kung Fu Panda theme was removed and the name was changed to Dragon Rush, with the retheming of the area to Dragon Empire.

The ride is painted entirely red.

6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.
